arts.ttl: Emegha and Milambo in Netherlands U21 squad but no Ihattaren
arts.sum: The Netherlands U21 squad has been named for the upcoming friendlies against Italy and Romania. Jong Oranje are preparing for the European Championships this summer and Michael Reiziger has only picked one new face in his squad. Aston Villa defender Lamare Bogarde makes his Jong Oranje debut. There was questions about whether Mohammed Ihattaren would […] The post Emegha and Milambo in Netherlands U21 squad but no Ihattaren appeared first on Football Oranje.
